list.name: convoy_id
list.label: Convoy
list.query: SELECT id AS __value, CONCAT(LEFT(title, 60), ' [', status, ']') AS __text FROM hq.issues WHERE issue_type = 'convoy' ORDER BY CASE WHEN status IN ('open','in_progress') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, updated_at DESC LIMIT 100

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS stale FROM (
  SELECT w.id FROM sfgastown.wisps w JOIN sfgastown.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request' WHERE w.status = 'open' AND w.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR
  UNION ALL
  SELECT w.id FROM lora_forge.wisps w JOIN lora_forge.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request' WHERE w.status = 'open' AND w.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR
  UNION ALL
  SELECT w.id FROM sf_workflows.wisps w JOIN sf_workflows.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request' WHERE w.status = 'open' AND w.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR
) t
SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, MAX(w.created_at), NOW()) / 60.0, 1), 999) AS hours_since FROM hq.wisps w WHERE w.title LIKE 'MERGED %'

panels.title: Zero-Retry Stuck MRs
panels.description: Open MRs older than 1h with retry_count=0 — refinery never touched them

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS stuck FROM (
  SELECT w.id FROM sfgastown.wisps w JOIN sfgastown.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request'
  WHERE w.status = 'open' AND w.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR
  AND (w.description NOT LIKE '%retry_count: %' OR SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'retry_count: ', -1), '\n', 1) = '0')
  UNION ALL
  SELECT w.id FROM lora_forge.wisps w JOIN lora_forge.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request'
  WHERE w.status = 'open' AND w.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR
  AND (w.description NOT LIKE '%retry_count: %' OR SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'retry_count: ', -1), '\n', 1) = '0')
  UNION ALL
  SELECT w.id FROM sf_workflows.wisps w JOIN sf_workflows.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request'
  WHERE w.status = 'open' AND w.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR
  AND (w.description NOT LIKE '%retry_count: %' OR SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'retry_count: ', -1), '\n', 1) = '0')
) t

panels.title: Refinery Last Seen (hours)
panels.description: Hours since last refinery bd call in VictoriaMetrics. Red if >4h = refinery likely dead.

panels.title: Per-Rig Refinery Health
panels.description: Last refinery activity per rig, stale MR count, and health status

targets.rawSql:
SELECT rig,
  open_mrs,
  stale_mrs,
  COALESCE(CONCAT(ROUND(oldest_age_hrs, 1), 'h'), '—') AS oldest_mr,
  COALESCE(CONCAT(max_retries), '—') AS max_retries,
  CASE
    WHEN open_mrs = 0 THEN 'OK'
    WHEN stale_mrs > 0 AND max_retries = 0 THEN 'DEAD'
    WHEN stale_mrs > 0 THEN 'STALE'
    WHEN oldest_age_hrs > 1 THEN 'AGING'
    ELSE 'OK'
  END AS health
FROM (
  SELECT 'sfgastown' AS rig,
    COUNT(*) AS open_mrs,
    SUM(CASE WHEN w.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS stale_mrs,
    MAX(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, w.created_at, NOW()) / 60.0) AS oldest_age_hrs,
    MAX(CASE WHEN w.description LIKE '%retry_count: %' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'retry_count: ', -1), '\n', 1) AS UNSIGNED) ELSE 0 END) AS max_retries
  FROM sfgastown.wisps w
  JOIN sfgastown.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request'
  WHERE w.status = 'open'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'lora_forge',
    COUNT(*),
    SUM(CASE WHEN w.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
    MAX(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, w.created_at, NOW()) / 60.0),
    MAX(CASE WHEN w.description LIKE '%retry_count: %' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'retry_count: ', -1), '\n', 1) AS UNSIGNED) ELSE 0 END)
  FROM lora_forge.wisps w
  JOIN lora_forge.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request'
  WHERE w.status = 'open'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'sf_workflows',
    COUNT(*),
    SUM(CASE WHEN w.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
    MAX(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, w.created_at, NOW()) / 60.0),
    MAX(CASE WHEN w.description LIKE '%retry_count: %' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'retry_count: ', -1), '\n', 1) AS UNSIGNED) ELSE 0 END)
  FROM sf_workflows.wisps w
  JOIN sf_workflows.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request'
  WHERE w.status = 'open'
) t
ORDER BY stale_mrs DESC, open_mrs DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS open_mrs FROM (
  SELECT w.id FROM sfgastown.wisps w JOIN sfgastown.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request' WHERE w.status = 'open'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT w.id FROM lora_forge.wisps w JOIN lora_forge.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request' WHERE w.status = 'open'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT w.id FROM sf_workflows.wisps w JOIN sf_workflows.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request' WHERE w.status = 'open'
) t
SELECT COUNT(*) AS merged_24h FROM hq.wisps w WHERE w.title LIKE 'MERGED %' AND w.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR

SELECT COUNT(*) AS failed FROM (
  SELECT w.id FROM sfgastown.wisps w JOIN sfgastown.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request' WHERE w.status = 'closed' AND w.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
  UNION ALL
  SELECT w.id FROM lora_forge.wisps w JOIN lora_forge.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request' WHERE w.status = 'closed' AND w.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
  UNION ALL
  SELECT w.id FROM sf_workflows.wisps w JOIN sf_workflows.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request' WHERE w.status = 'closed' AND w.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
) t

SELECT COALESCE(CONCAT(ROUND(AVG(age_mins)), 'm'), '—') AS avg_age FROM (
  SELECT TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, w.created_at, NOW()) AS age_mins FROM sfgastown.wisps w JOIN sfgastown.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request' WHERE w.status = 'open'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, w.created_at, NOW()) AS age_mins FROM lora_forge.wisps w JOIN lora_forge.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request' WHERE w.status = 'open'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, w.created_at, NOW()) AS age_mins FROM sf_workflows.wisps w JOIN sf_workflows.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request' WHERE w.status = 'open'
) t

SELECT COALESCE(CONCAT(ROUND(MAX(age_hrs), 1), 'h'), '—') AS oldest FROM (
  SELECT TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, w.created_at, NOW()) / 60.0 AS age_hrs FROM sfgastown.wisps w JOIN sfgastown.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request' WHERE w.status = 'open'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, w.created_at, NOW()) / 60.0 FROM lora_forge.wisps w JOIN lora_forge.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request' WHERE w.status = 'open'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, w.created_at, NOW()) / 60.0 FROM sf_workflows.wisps w JOIN sf_workflows.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request' WHERE w.status = 'open'
) t

SELECT rig, id, title, status, worker, source_issue, branch, retries, created_at,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, created_at, NOW()) AS age_mins,
  CASE
    WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, created_at, NOW()) > 1440 AND retries = '0' THEN 'DEAD'
    WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, created_at, NOW()) > 360 THEN 'STALE'
    WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, created_at, NOW()) > 60 THEN 'AGING'
    ELSE 'OK'
  END AS health
FROM (
  SELECT 'sfgastown' AS rig, w.id, w.title, w.status, w.created_at,
    CASE WHEN w.description LIKE '%worker: %' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'worker: ', -1), '\n', 1) ELSE '—' END AS worker,
    CASE WHEN w.description LIKE '%source_issue: %' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'source_issue: ', -1), '\n', 1) ELSE '—' END AS source_issue,
    SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'branch: ', -1), '\n', 1) AS branch,
    CASE WHEN w.description LIKE '%retry_count: %' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'retry_count: ', -1), '\n', 1) ELSE '0' END AS retries
  FROM sfgastown.wisps w
  JOIN sfgastown.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request'
  WHERE w.status = 'open'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'lora_forge', w.id, w.title, w.status, w.created_at,
    CASE WHEN w.description LIKE '%worker: %' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'worker: ', -1), '\n', 1) ELSE '—' END,
    CASE WHEN w.description LIKE '%source_issue: %' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'source_issue: ', -1), '\n', 1) ELSE '—' END,
    SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'branch: ', -1), '\n', 1),
    CASE WHEN w.description LIKE '%retry_count: %' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'retry_count: ', -1), '\n', 1) ELSE '0' END
  FROM lora_forge.wisps w
  JOIN lora_forge.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request'
  WHERE w.status = 'open'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'sf_workflows', w.id, w.title, w.status, w.created_at,
    CASE WHEN w.description LIKE '%worker: %' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'worker: ', -1), '\n', 1) ELSE '—' END,
    CASE WHEN w.description LIKE '%source_issue: %' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'source_issue: ', -1), '\n', 1) ELSE '—' END,
    SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'branch: ', -1), '\n', 1),
    CASE WHEN w.description LIKE '%retry_count: %' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'retry_count: ', -1), '\n', 1) ELSE '0' END
  FROM sf_workflows.wisps w
  JOIN sf_workflows.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request'
  WHERE w.status = 'open'
) t
ORDER BY age_mins DESC

SELECT w.id,
  w.title,
  SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'Branch: ', -1), '\n', 1) AS branch,
  SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'Issue: ', -1), '\n', 1) AS source_issue,
  SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.description, 'Merged-At: ', -1), '\n', 1) AS merged_at,
  w.created_at
FROM hq.wisps w
WHERE w.title LIKE 'MERGED %'
ORDER BY w.created_at DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN title LIKE 'MERGE_READY:%' THEN 'MERGE_READY'
    WHEN title LIKE 'MERGED %' THEN 'MERGED'
    ELSE 'Other'
  END AS signal_type,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM hq.wisps
WHERE title LIKE 'MERGE%'
GROUP BY signal_type

SELECT
  w.created_at AS time,
  TRIM(REPLACE(w.title, 'MERGED ', '')) AS worker,
  1 AS merges
FROM hq.wisps w
WHERE w.title LIKE 'MERGED %'
  AND w.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
ORDER BY w.created_at

panels.title: Refinery bd Call Duration (p95 by harness)
Tool Calls by Tool (all roles)
panels.description: Claude Code tool_result events from VictoriaLogs, grouped by tool_name

targets.expr: event.name:tool_result | stats by (tool_name) count() as calls | sort by (calls) desc

panels.title: Tool Calls by Role
panels.description: Claude Code tool_result events grouped by gt.role — shows which roles are most active

targets.expr: event.name:tool_result AND gt.role:* | stats by (gt.role) count() as calls | sort by (calls) desc

panels.title: Refinery Tool Calls
panels.description: Tool calls from refinery sessions — shows what the refinery agent is doing

targets.expr: event.name:tool_result AND gt.role:~"refinery" | stats by (tool_name) count() as calls | sort by (calls) desc

panels.title: Tool Call Timeline (by role)
panels.description: Tool call events over time, colored by gt.role

targets.rawSql:
SELECT rig,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS open_mrs,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS closed_mrs,
  COUNT(*) AS total
FROM (
  SELECT 'sfgastown' AS rig, w.status
  FROM sfgastown.wisps w
  JOIN sfgastown.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'lora_forge', w.status
  FROM lora_forge.wisps w
  JOIN lora_forge.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'sf_workflows', w.status
  FROM sf_workflows.wisps w
  JOIN sf_workflows.wisp_labels wl ON wl.issue_id = w.id AND wl.label = 'gt:merge-request'
) t
GROUP BY rig
ORDER BY open_mrs DESC

SELECT
  TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(w.title, 'MERGED ', ''), 'MERGED', '')) AS worker,
  COUNT(*) AS merge_count
FROM hq.wisps w
WHERE w.title LIKE 'MERGED %'
GROUP BY worker
ORDER BY merge_count DESC
